headings.description: Elegant, serif font for all primary headings (H1-H4). Imparts a luxury, spa-like feel.

body.description: Clean, highly readable sans-serif for body text, forms, and small labels.

scales.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-[#E8D5A3]

micro_themes.luxury_card: bg-salon-card border border-salon-gold/20 shadow-lg shadow-black/50 hover:border-salon-gold/50 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm

buttons.primary: bg-salon-gold text-salon-black font-semibold min-h-[48px] px-8 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#DFC06E] transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-base
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-salon-gold border border-salon-gold min-h-[48px] px-8 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-salon-gold/10 transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.whatsapp_fab: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 w-14 h-14 bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300

inputs.standard: min-h-[48px] w-full bg-salon-black border border-salon-gold/30 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-salon-cream focus:border-salon-gold focus:ring-1 focus:ring-salon-gold outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-salon-cream/30

booking_stepper.text: text-sm text-salon-champagne font-sans mt-2 text-right block

home.hero: Full screen (min-h-[90vh]) with 'hero_background' or 'model_portrait'. Heavy left-aligned text emphasizing luxury. Primary 'Book Appointment' CTA.
home.features: 3-column grid showing key value props (Luxury Experience, Expert Stylists, Premium Products).
home.services_preview: Bento grid (Mode A: Tetris) highlighting categories (Hair, Bridal, Spa).
home.reviews: Testimonial carousel or masonry grid using luxury_card style.

services.layout: Tabs component (Shadcn customized) filtering by: Hair, Nails, Skin, Bridal, Spa, Men's.
services.cards: List or grid of services with titles (Cormorant), descriptions, prices, and 'Book' button.

booking.flow: Multi-step form (Step 1: Service, Step 2: Stylist, Step 3: Date/Time, Step 4: Details). Must include progress bar. Use Shadcn Calendar and Select components heavily styled to dark/gold theme.
booking.ux: Max 2 taps per selection. Clear loading states and success confirmation.

gallery.layout: Asymmetric masonry or bento grid. Click to open lightbox (Shadcn Dialog/Carousel).

about.content: Salon history, 'Meet the Team' (stylist portraits), statistics (Years of Experience, Happy Clients).

contact.layout: Split layout: Contact form (left) and Map/Info (right). Include address: G-4, Gajanand The Business Hub, Nana Bazaar, Vallabh Vidyanagar, Bakrol, Anand.

admin_dashboard.layout: Password-protected (mock auth or simple JWT). Use 'Control Room' dense grid. Tables for upcoming bookings, status toggles (Pending, Confirmed, Completed).

hero_background.description: Intricate golden wave patterns creating a luxurious abstract art piece.

salon_interior.description: Sleek beauty salon interior with contemporary furniture.

service_spa.description: Serene spa setting, woman receiving neck massage.

service_nails.description: Close-up of a hand with artistic red manicure.

model_portrait.description: Portrait of young woman with beautiful hair.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Inject Google Fonts ('Cormorant Garamond' and 'Lato') into the main HTML/CSS immediately.
CRITICAL: Adhere STRICTLY to the color palette. No generic grays or standard Tailwind blues. Use the salon-black, salon-charcoal, and salon-gold definitions.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have a min-height of 48px to satisfy the mobile-first 'thumb-friendly' requirement.
CRITICAL: The Booking process must be multi-step with a clear progress indicator (e.g., 'Step 1 of 4') and max 2 taps per step on mobile.
CRITICAL: Ensure the WhatsApp Floating Action Button (FAB) is globally present and fixed at bottom-right.
CRITICAL: Ensure the Nav bar is sticky at the top, uses glassmorphism, and ALWAYS contains the 'Book Now' CTA button.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use rounded-lg or rounded-xl for containers. Use sharp corners (rounded-none) or very subtle (rounded-sm) to maintain the premium, architectural aesthetic.
TESTING: Every single button, link, and form input MUST contain a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='booking-submit-btn').
ASSETS: NEVER use placeholder images (via.placeholder.com). Use ONLY the URLs provided in the 'media' object above. If more are needed, reuse them creatively.
COMPONENTS: Prefer raw HTML/Tailwind for artistic marketing sections. Use customized Shadcn UI for forms, tabs, dropdowns, and dialogs.
